scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production TS_NODE_COMPILER_OPTIONS="{\"module\":\"ESNext\",\"noEmit\":false,\"strict\":false,\"skipLibCheck\":true}" webpack --config client/webpack.config.ts --mode production && tsc --project server/tsconfig.json
scripts.server:watch: cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch server/src --ext ts --exec "tsx --tsconfig server/tsconfig.json server/src/server.ts"
scripts.dev: npm run db:migrate --workspace=server && concurrently "npm run webpack:watch" "npm run server:watch"
